name: AfdxInitProtocol
title: AfdxInitProtocol
syntax: long AfdxInitProtocol( long packet, char protocolDesignator[] ); // form 1
long AfdxInitProtocol( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char packetTypeDesignator[] ); // form 2
description: This function initializes the protocol for a packet. If necessary further needed lower protocols are initialized, e.g. IPv4. Already initialized higher protocols are deleted.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
